# Extração: 05-SEO Setup and Research Checklist

---

Setup Google Search Console
Setup Google Business Profile
Setup Bing Webmaster Tools
Confirm site is indexed by Google
Purchase an SEO research tool
Check indexing and broken pages
Install SEO plugin (if Wordpress)
Add image compressor (Wordpress)
Create and submit a sitemap
Block unwanted pages with robot.txt
WEBSITE BASICS
Get a keyword friendly domain
Set up an HTTPS for your domain
Check your domain forwarding
Create a website hierarchy plan
Use search friendly page URLs
Test load time of your website
Make sure site is mobile friendly
Make sure you have no errors
Check for any duplicate content
Continually optimize website speed
Check for broken links (in and out)
Update posts and content ongoing
WEBSITE OPTIMIZATION
Create list of your competitors
Brainstorm topic and questions
Create master list of keywords
Identify highest value keywords
Create list of long-tail variations
Research difficulty of ranking
Pick primary term for each page
Pick long tail term for each page
KEYWORD RESEARCH
